targeted_checks.command: cd web/backend && PYTHONPATH=. PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 pytest tests/test_system_settings_contract.py tests/test_health_route_conflicts.py -q -o addopts="" -k system_settings

contract_refresh.note: Live PM2 runtime GET checks were measured directly. General-section write closure is backed by targeted backend/frontend tests; no destructive shared-runtime write smoke was executed in this refresh.

resolved_issues: Phase 4 mock matrix normalized to VITE_USE_MOCK_DATA=false with Playwright route stubs
Risk and System phase pages now have dedicated mock-matrix evidence
System-Data mock batch write payload construction is explicitly covered
Live PM2 frontend proxy env was refreshed back to BACKEND_PORT=8020 so /api/health/ready returned to 200 during the artifact refresh

System-Config now routes to the canonical views/system/Settings.vue page, reads/writes the general section through /api/v1/system/settings/general, and keeps the broader settings truth sectioned instead of local-only.

The approved sectioned system-settings contract landed with canonical backend routes for general/security backed by PostgreSQL system_config, removing the previous backend contract/runtime gap from the Phase 4 closeout.
